; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [14 x i8] c"Hello, world!\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.0)
  ret i32 0
}
